Curated and sealed two distinct manually visually reviewed adult raster fixtures with exact immutable S01 evidence: Kevin-supplied triptych has 3 visible/3 raw/3 promoted; governed Ultralytics street scene has 4 visible/4 raw/3 promoted under max_instances=3. qa/multi_instance_fixtures/manifest.json embeds source/evidence SHA-256, geometry, reviewer, age/rights provenance, model/config identity, boxes, and promoted pN list. Sealer rejects count mismatch, hash drift, unsafe paths, invalid boxes, duplicate rasters, and non-adult sources. Live --through-drafts on the supplied triptych reached the real outer-loop boundary but S02 refused WSL_E_DISTRO_NOT_FOUND, so downstream package counts remain explicitly false. 540 full tests pass.

Closed the prior downstream gap after local CUDA activation. Corrected the fixture authority's stale hard-coded cap 3 to the configured/doc-17 default 4 and made downstream_package_count_verified derive fail-closed from exact S02-S09 receipts, S09.5 manifest, and draft fan-out. The licensed bus fixture was canonically age-screened but honestly rejected as an exact-package fixture when p2 hit S02 ratio 0.311724 <0.35; no threshold was relaxed.

MF-P8-01.03.evidence: qa/multi_instance_fixtures/manifest.json now seals two distinct governed, manually visually counted adult sources under doc 17/config max_instances_per_image=4: supplied_adult_triptych_3 has raw/manual 3 and exact p0-p2 completed draft packages; supplied_adult_four_view_4 has raw/manual 4 and exact p0-p3 completed draft packages. For every promoted instance, S02-S09 receipts are complete, draft_contract.json exists, S09.5 image_manifest promoted_instances matches exactly, and no extra instance directory exists. Sealer rejects stale cap/count/hash/path/stage evidence; live contract test passes.

notes.text: Parameterized N=1 outer-loop regression produces exactly p0, trivial passing S09.5 index, and existing single-person suite remains green; explicit byte-identical before/after artifact comparison is still missing.

Added verify_single_person_regression over the full S02-S09 pre-P8 versus activated instances/p0 trees. It requires every legacy relative file and byte to match, emits per-stage and whole-tree SHA-256 evidence, and separately allowlists/records only the intentional P8 other_person_protected.png addition. The N=1 outer-loop fixture now runs a legacy direct baseline and activated p0 path from the same deterministic stage producer; all 9 stages/12 legacy files match, and a one-byte S07 drift hard-fails. 27 focused production tests and 538 full tests pass. Final 5% remains byte comparison of a real P1-P7 reviewed package replay, not just draft/stage artifacts.

MF-P8-01.04.evidence: Real governed single-person source img_2ca794d19be9 (clear_adult, person_count=1) completed independent direct-layout and activated instances/p0 GPU replays through S02-S09. Both authoritative S09 maps were byte-identical; projecting the direct result through D1 produced exactly one p0 package with the same 59 files, all 56 atomic masks, no missing/extra/changed bytes, and tree SHA-256 b5a082e347422e9cf212924fd16decb53d901ea1e55131c222fc400916262c96. Intermediate timing and tiny native GDINO/DensePose nondeterminism are explicitly disclosed and did not change any authoritative package byte. Durable verifier checks p0 cardinality, exact file set/bytes, strict masks, non-overlap, coverage, and map reproduction. Evidence qa/live_verification/single_person_real_p8_regression_20260712.json; 678 tests pass.
